title: Login with valid credentials
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Enter 'appcrawler2@gmail.com' into the email input field | Enter 'SecurePassword123' into the password input field | Tap the 'LOGIN' button
expected_result: The user is logged in successfully and redirected to the home screen

title: Login with invalid credentials
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Enter 'invalidemail@gmail.com' into the email input field | Enter 'SecurePassword123' into the password input field | Tap the 'LOGIN' button
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials

title: Login with empty email field
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Enter '' into the email input field | Enter 'SecurePassword123' into the password input field | Tap the 'LOGIN' button
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating empty email field

title: Login with empty password field
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Enter 'appcrawler2@gmail.com' into the email input field | Enter '' into the password input field | Tap the 'LOGIN' button
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating empty password field

title: Toggle 'Remind me' switch
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Enter 'appcrawler2@gmail.com' into the email input field | Enter 'SecurePassword123' into the password input field | Toggle the 'Remind me' switch | Tap the 'LOGIN' button
expected_result: The user is logged in successfully and the 'Remind me' switch state is toggled

title: Click on 'I've forgotten my password' link
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Enter 'appcrawler2@gmail.com' into the email input field | Enter 'SecurePassword123' into the password input field | Tap the 'I've forgotten my password' link
expected_result: The user is redirected to the password reset screen

title: Login with invalid email format
preconditions: The app is launched and the login screen is displayed
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the login screen | Enter 'invalidemail' into the email input field | Enter 'SecurePassword123' into the password input field | Tap the 'LOGIN' button
